revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23986660476|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:市ヶ尾横穴古墳群]] '''''' {{Japanese Kofun |name=Ichigao Yokoanabo Cluster |alternate_name=Ichigao Yokoanabos |location={{ill|Aoba-ku, Yokohama|en|Aoba-ku, Yokohama|qid=Q1203361|lt=Aoba Ward, Yokohama|1=Aoba-ku, Yokohama}}, {{ill|Yokohama|en|Yokohama|qid=Q38283|lt=Yokohama|1=Yokohama}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, Ichigaochō 1639-2 |coordinates={{Coord|35|33|26.65|N|139|32|23.97|E|}} |type={{ill|Yokoanabos|lt=Yokoanabos|ja|横穴墓|1=Yokoanabo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabos|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabo|qq=}} |built=Late 6th century – Late 7th century |map_size=19 cave tombs |burial_persons= |Historic Site=Designated as a Kanagawa Prefectural Historic site on February 19, 1957 (Shōwa 32){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Aoba Ward General Affairs Division, Ward Administration Promotion Section|url=https://www.city.yokohama.lg.jp/aoba/shokai/bunkazai/a/bunkazai006.html|title=Ichigao Yokoanabo Cluster|publisher=Aoba Ward, Yokohama City|date=2021-12-20|accessdate=2022-02-15}} |archaeological_site_id= |burial goods={{ill|Sue pottery|en|Sue pottery|qid=Q7634351|lt=Sue pottery|1=Sue pottery}}, {{ill|Haji pottery|en|Haji pottery|qid=Q5639938|lt=Haji pottery|1=Haji pottery}} |image=[[File:Ichigao Yokoana Group-A, gaikan-1.jpg|280px]]
Group A
[[File:Ichigao Yokoana Group-B, gaikan-2.jpg|280px]]
Group B |map={{location map|Japan Kanagawa|lat_deg=35|lat_min=33|lat_sec=26.65|lon_deg=139|lon_min=32|lon_sec=23.97|label=Ichigao Cave
Tomb Cluster|mark=Yokoanabo.svg|marksize=28|caption=location in Kanagawa Prefecture|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|border=none}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|35|33|26.65|N|139|32|23.97|E}}}} }} '''Ichigao Yokoanabo Cluster''' (市ヶ尾横穴古墳群, いちがおよこあなこふんぐん), also known as '''Ichigao Yokoanabos''' (市ヶ尾横穴墓群, いちがおよこあなぼぐん), is a group of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Yokoanabos|ja|横穴墓|1=Yokoanabo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabo|qq=}} located in {{ill|Ichigaochō|ja|市ケ尾町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichigaochō|1=Ichigaochō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11479968}}, {{ill|Aoba-ku, Yokohama|en|Aoba-ku, Yokohama|qid=Q1203361|lt=Aoba Ward, Yokohama|1=Aoba-ku, Yokohama}}, {{ill|Yokohama|en|Yokohama|qid=Q38283|lt=Yokohama|1=Yokohama}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.The name "Ichigao Kofun Cluster" (市ヶ尾横穴古墳群) follows the official designation as a historic site in 1957, but since the term "kofun" (古墳) technically refers to Kofuns with raised tombs, "yokoana-bo" (横穴墓, cave tombs) is the more accurate modern term. However, cave tombs are still classified under the broader category of kofun. It is designation1 as a {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} of Kanagawa Prefecture. [[File:市ヶ尾横穴墓群B群.JPG|250px|right|thumb|'''{{ill|Ichigao Yokoanabo Cluster|lt=Ichigao Yokoanabo Cluster|lt=Ichigao Yokana Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichigao Yokana Cluster|qq=}} B Cluster: Forecourt and entrance.''']]'''Yokoanabos''' (横穴墓, Yokōbo/Ouketsubo{{Cite web|language=ja|url=https://www.rekihaku.city.yokohama.jp/maibun/qa/detail.php?seq=22%7Ctitle=Q：横穴墓ってなんて読むのですか?%7Cpublisher=Yokohama City Foundation for History and Culture|accessdate=2018-07-28]]) are burial tombs generally carved into slopes or cliffs, typically measuring around 2 meters in height and extending several meters in depth. These tombs served as burial chambers in ancient East Asia and are most commonly associated with the [[Kofun period]] in Japan, where this burial emerged and became widely used. == Overview == The tombs were discovered in 1933 (Shōwa 8). In 1957 (Shōwa 32), they were designation1 as a historic site by Kanagawa Prefecture and were later developed into the '''Ichigao Archaeological Park''' in 1978 (Shōwa 53). The site is located on the left bank of the {{ill|Tsurumi_River|en|Tsurumi_River|qid=Q7850292|lt=Tsurumi River|1=Tsurumi River}} (Tanimoto River) in a hilly area, with the tombs carved into the cliffs facing the river. The cluster is divided into '''Group A''' (12 tombs in the north) and '''Group B''' (7 tombs in the south). These tombs are believed to have been constructed in the late '''6th to late 7th century''', during the final phase of the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|qid=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}, and were used for the burials of prominent farming families. burial goods such as '''Sue pottery''' and '''Haji pottery''' have been excavated from inside and around the tombs. A walking trail has been developed through the park alongside the tombs. The '''Aoba Ward''' region, including Ichigaochō, contains many {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Yokoanabos|ja|横穴墓|1=Yokoanabo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoanabo|qq=}} and {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}}. Approximately '''800 meters west''' of this site lies the '''Inarimae Kofun Cluster''' (稲荷前古墳群), which is designation1 as a '''Prefectural Historic site''' and is believed to be the burial ground of the rulers of the Tsuzuki region. == Gallery == image:市ヶ尾横穴墓群A-8号横穴.JPG|Interior of A-8 Yokoanabo image:市ヶ尾横穴墓群A-9号横穴.JPG|Interior of A-9 Yokoanabo image:市ヶ尾横穴墓群B-2号横穴.JPG|Interior of B-2 Yokoanabo File:市ヶ尾横穴群出土 須恵器 フラスコ形長頸瓶.JPG|Sue pottery flask-shaped long-necked jar
{{small|On display at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|en|Tokyo National Museum|qid=Q653433|lt=Tokyo National Museum|1=Tokyo National Museum}}.}} == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Ichigao Kofun Group}} {{Japanese Historic site}} == Distribution and Notable Yokoanabo Tombs == These tombs are found from Kyushu through San'in, Kinki, Hokuriku, and Tokai, with a high concentration in [[Southern Kantō]]. The northern limit is thought to be in northern {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|qid=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}. Approximately 3,000 examples exist in {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. === Tōhoku Region === * {{ill|Yamahata Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamahata Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōsaki, Miyagi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsaki, Miyagi|qq=}}, {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|qid=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, 26 tombs * {{ill|Atagoyama Yokoanabos|ja|愛宕山横穴墓群|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atagoyama Yokoanabos|qq=}} ({{ill|Taihaku-ku, Sendai|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taihaku-ku, Sendai|qq=}}, {{ill|Sendai|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sendai|qq=}}) * {{ill|Mogasaki Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mogasaki Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Taihaku-ku, Sendai) - 25 tombs, no longer extant * {{ill|Sōzenji Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōzenji Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Taihaku-ku, Sendai) * {{ill|Kiyotosaku Yokoanabo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotosaku Yokoanabo|qq=}} ({{ill|Futaba, Fukushima|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futaba, Fukushima|qq=}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|qid=Q71707|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|1=Fukushima Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, over 300 tombs * {{ill|Izumizaki Yokoanabo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumizaki Yokoanabo|qq=}} ({{ill|Nishishirakawa District|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishishirakawa District|qq=}}, {{ill|Izumizaki, Fukushima|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumizaki, Fukushima|qq=}}) - National Historic site * {{ill|Nakata Yokoanabos|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakata Yokoanabos|qq=}} ({{ill|Iwaki, Fukushima|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaki, Fukushima|qq=}}) - National Historic site * {{ill|Hayama Yokoanabo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hayama Yokoanabo|qq=}} ({{ill|Minamisōma|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamisōma|qq=}}, Fukushima Prefecture) - National Historic site * {{ill|Wada Daibutsu and Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wada Daibutsu and Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Sukagawa|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukagawa|qq=}}, Fukushima Prefecture) - Municipal Historic site === Kantō Region === * {{ill|Jūgorō-ana Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgorō-ana Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Hitachinaka, Ibaraki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitachinaka, Ibaraki|qq=}}, {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}) - Over 300 tombs * {{ill|Karanogosho Yokoanabo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karanogosho Yokoanabo|qq=}} ({{ill|Nasukaragawa, Tochigi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nasukaragawa, Tochigi|qq=}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, part of the Hokōda and Wami Yokoanabo Clusters * {{ill|Nagaoka Hundred Caves|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Hundred Caves|qq=}} ({{ill|Utsunomiya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya|qq=}}, Tochigi Prefecture) - 52 tombs * {{ill|Yoshimi Hundred Caves|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshimi Hundred Caves|qq=}} ({{ill|Yoshimi, Saitama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshimi, Saitama|qq=}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, over 200 tombs * {{ill|Kuroiwa Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroiwa Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Yoshimi, Saitama) - Over 30 tombs * {{ill|Jūrō Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūrō Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Hatoyama, Saitama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hatoyama, Saitama|qq=}}, Saitama) - 3 tombs * {{ill|Takinojō Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takinojō Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Tokorozawa|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokorozawa|qq=}}, Saitama) - 9 tombs * {{ill|Kitaakitsu Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitaakitsu Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Tokorozawa, Saitama) - 8 tombs * {{ill|Bikuniyama Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bikuniyama Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Higashimatsuyama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashimatsuyama|qq=}}, Saitama) - Over 50 tombs * {{ill|Takane Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takane Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Kumagaya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumagaya|qq=}}, Saitama) - Municipal Historic site * {{ill|Nagara Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagara Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Nagara, Chiba|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagara, Chiba|qq=}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, over 300 tombs * {{ill|Deyama Graves|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deyama Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Mitaka, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitaka, Tokyo|qq=}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}) - Metropolitan Historic site, 10 tombs * {{ill|Nakawada Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakawada Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Tama, Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tama, Tokyo|qq=}}, Tokyo) - 14 tombs * {{ill|Todoroki Ravine Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todoroki Ravine Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Setagaya|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Setagaya|qq=}}, Tokyo) * {{ill|Ekoda Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ekoda Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Aoba-ku, Yokohama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoba-ku, Yokohama|qq=}}, {{ill|Yokohama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama|qq=}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}) - Municipal Historic site, 2 tombs * {{ill|Ichigao Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichigao Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Aoba-ku, Yokohama) - Prefectural Historic site, 19 tombs * {{ill|Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|qq=}} (Kamakura-style tomb concentration) ** {{ill|Matsugasaki Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsugasaki Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Kōnan-ku, Yokohama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōnan-ku, Yokohama|qq=}}, Yokohama) - Municipal Historic site, 8 tombs ** {{ill|Shichisekiyama Yokoanabo Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichisekiyama Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Sakae-ku, Yokohama|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakae-ku, Yokohama|qq=}}, Yokohama) - Over 100 tombs originally ** {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=}} (Sakae-ku, Yokohama) - 23 tombs ** {{ill|Hikoshigaya Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikoshigaya Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Sakae-ku, Yokohama) - 12 tombs === Tokai Region === * {{ill|Kashiya Yokoanabos|en|Kashiya Yokoanabos|qid=Q22118267|lt=Kashiya Yokoanabos|1=Kashiya Yokoanabos}} ({{ill|Kannami|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannami|qq=}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, 106 tombs * {{ill|Kitaema Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitaema Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Izunokuni|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izunokuni|qq=}}, Shizuoka) - National Historic site, 101 tombs * {{ill|E-no-ura Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/E-no-ura Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Numazu|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Numazu|qq=}}, Shizuoka) - Prefectural Historic site, 92 tombs === Hokuriku Region === * {{ill|Hōōzan Yokoanabos|en|Hōōzan Yokoanabos|qid=Q18339249|lt=Hōōzan Yokoanabos|1=Hōōzan Cave Tombs}} ({{ill|Kaga, Ishikawa|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaga, Ishikawa|qq=}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|qid=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, over 150 tombs === Kinki Region === * {{ill|Takaida Yokoanabos|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaida Yokoanabos|qq=}} ({{ill|Kashiwara, Osaka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kashiwara, Osaka|qq=}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, over 200 tombs * {{ill|Anfuku-ji (Kashiwara)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anfukuji Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Kashiwara, Osaka) - 32 tombs === Chūgoku Region === * {{ill|Jūōmen Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūōmen Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Matsue|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsue|qq=}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}) - 37 tombs * {{ill|Kitsunedani Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitsunedani Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Matsue, Shimane) - 16 tombs * {{ill|Kamikonishi Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikonishi Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Izumo, Shimane|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo, Shimane|qq=}}, Shimane) * {{ill|Takatsuku Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takatsuku Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Chibu, Shimane|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chibu, Shimane|qq=}}, [[:en:Oki District|Oki District]]) === Kyushu Region === * {{ill|Takenami Site|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takenami Site|qq=}} ({{ill|Yukuhashi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yukuhashi|qq=}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}) - Over 1,000 tombs * {{ill|Shiroyama Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroyama Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Fukuchi, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukuchi, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka) - National Historic site, over 200 tombs * {{ill|Mizumachi Site|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizumachi Site|qq=}} ({{ill|Nōgata|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōgata|qq=}}, Fukuoka) - Prefectural Historic site, over 40 tombs * {{ill|Kozuki Yokoanabo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozuki Yokoanabo|qq=}} ({{ill|Kurate, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurate, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka) - National Historic site * {{ill|Ishinuki Nagino Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishinuki Nagino Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Tamana|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamana|qq=}}, {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|qid=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture|1=Kumamoto Prefecture}}) - National Historic site * {{ill|Ishinuki Anakanon Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishinuki Anakanon Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} (Tamana, Kumamoto) - National Historic site * {{ill|Nabeta Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nabeta Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Yamaga, Kumamoto|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamaga, Kumamoto|qq=}}, Kumamoto) - National Historic site, 60 tombs * {{ill|Ōmura Yokoanabo Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmura Yokoanabo Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Hitoyoshi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitoyoshi|qq=}}, Kumamoto) - National Historic site, 27 tombs * {{ill|Yokkaichi Yokoanabo Cluster|en|Yokkaichi Yokoanabo Cluster|qid=Q11419962|lt=Yokkaichi Yokoanabo Cluster|1=Yokkaichi Yokoanabo Cluster}} ({{ill|Usa (宇佐)|lt=Usa (宇佐)|lt=Usa|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usa|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōita Prefecture|en|Ōita Prefecture|qid=Q133924|lt=Ōita Prefecture|1=Ōita Prefecture}}) - National Historic site, 161 tombs * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Yokoanabo Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Yokoanabo Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|en|Miyazaki Prefecture|qid=Q130300|lt=Miyazaki Prefecture|1=Miyazaki Prefecture}}) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Yokoanabos. * {{Archaeology|qq=draft}} {{Kofun navbar}} [[ja:市ヶ尾横穴古墳群]] {{translated page|ja|市ヶ尾横穴古墳群|version=98043978|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{wikidata link|Q11479974}} [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
